data.title: Transak Adds Support for USDe, Synthetic Dollar Now Available Via Fiat On-Ramp
data.description:
Transak announced Thursday the listing of (CRYPTO: USDe), the synthetic dollar issued by Ethena Labs, on its global fiat on-ramp infrastructure. The move makes USDe, now the third-largest tokenized dollar by market capitalization, directly accessible via local payment methods to users outside the U. S. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/25/08/46969808/transak-adds-support-for-usde-synthetic-dollar-now-available-via-fiat-on-ramp?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Potential Impact of Cryptocurrency on U.S. Retirement Accounts
data.description: According to PANews, Ryan Rasmussen, Director of Research at Bitwise, has highlighted the potential influence of cryptocurrency on U.S. retirement accounts. If digital assets were to comprise between 1% and 10% of the total assets in 401(k) retirement accounts, it could lead to an influx of funds ranging from $80 billion to $800 billion. Bitwise data reveals that as of the second quarter of 2024, the total assets in U.S. 401(k) plans are nearing $8 trillion.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $274 Million in Liquidations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $274 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $58.19 million, while short positions saw liquidations amounting to $216 million.

data.title: Circle Mints 50 Million USDC on Ethereum Network
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Circle, the issuer of USDC, has minted an additional 50 million USDC tokens on the Ethereum network. This transaction was completed at 23:16 UTC+8. The move is part of Circle's ongoing efforts to manage the supply of its stablecoin, USDC, which is widely used in various financial applications and decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/28001093083929?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.description:

data.title: Uniswap Protocol Achieves Record Transaction Volume in 2025
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from Dune indicates that the Uniswap protocol has reached a total of 719,951,542 transactions so far in 2025. This marks a new annual record for the number of transactions processed by the protocol.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/28001391042330?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Animoca Brands and ProvLabs Forge Strategic Partnership for NUVA Development
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Animoca Brands and Provenance Blockchain Labs (ProvLabs) have announced a strategic partnership to develop NUVA, a vault marketplace connecting real-world asset (RWA) issuers with investors.

NUVA aims to be a unified, cross-chain compatible vault marketplace, offering unique yield strategies and risk characteristics for each vault. Investors, including retail investors, institutions, Web3 foundations, and treasuries, will be able to access a diverse range of investment products through NUVA without requiring permission.

data.title: FLOKI and ONDO extend gains as Robinhood listing boosts bullish momentum
data.description:
Robinhood has listed Floki Inu and Ondo Finance tokens. The move grants the duo exposure to Robinhood’s massive 25M user base, FLOKI sheds its meme status, while Ondo fuels the RWA narrative. Digital tokens have staged recoveries on Thursday as the global crypto market cap increased by over 3% in the past day to $3
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/floki-and-ondo-extend-gains-as-robinhood-listing-boosts-bullish-momentum/
